'''Dakuyl''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Verkuyl system/Legends|Verkuyl system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] where [[Alazhi/Legends|alazhi]] was grown. It was in the same [[Star system/Legends|system]] as [[Verkuyl]] and a secondary [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] production was begun on the planet, but halted after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].
